default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between fwd.digital and getdynamiq.ai for content marketing and SEO services.](https://fathom.video/share/hzSDmjzisTrj57qKCJQDdx3VYDckE6ys?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital offers AI-powered content strategy, production, and link-building services, with a focus on high-quality, efficient content creation](https://fathom.video/share/hzSDmjzisTrj57qKCJQDdx3VYDckE6ys?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [getdynamiq.ai, a recently launched AI application platform for regulated industries, is exploring marketing channels with content showing promise](https://fathom.video/share/hzSDmjzisTrj57qKCJQDdx3VYDckE6ys?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
  - [fwd.digital's services could help boost getdynamiq.ai's domain authority and organic traffic through strategic content creation and link building](https://fathom.video/share/hzSDmjzisTrj57qKCJQDdx3VYDckE6ys?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Engagement would start in February due to high demand, with a 12-month commitment and 90-day pilot period](https://fathom.video/share/hzSDmjzisTrj57qKCJQDdx3VYDckE6ys?tab=summary&timestamp=1222.0)

## Topics

### getdynamiq.ai Overview

  - [Launched in October 2023 after building since January](https://fathom.video/share/hzSDmjzisTrj57qKCJQDdx3VYDckE6ys?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
  - [Platform for developing and managing generative AI applications](https://fathom.video/share/hzSDmjzisTrj57qKCJQDdx3VYDckE6ys?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)
  - [Target market: Enterprise companies in highly regulated industries (banking, healthcare, government)](https://fathom.video/share/hzSDmjzisTrj57qKCJQDdx3VYDckE6ys?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Offers on-premise deployments for enhanced security](https://fathom.video/share/hzSDmjzisTrj57qKCJQDdx3VYDckE6ys?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Low-code builder for creating AI applications like secure, internal versions of ChatGPT](https://fathom.video/share/hzSDmjzisTrj57qKCJQDdx3VYDckE6ys?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Experimenting with marketing channels; content marketing showing good results](https://fathom.video/share/hzSDmjzisTrj57qKCJQDdx3VYDckE6ys?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
  - [Featured in publications like "The Rundown AI"](https://fathom.video/share/hzSDmjzisTrj57qKCJQDdx3VYDckE6ys?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)

### fwd.digital Services and Approach

  - [Founded \~6 months ago, approaching $4M ARR, self-funded and profitable](https://fathom.video/share/hzSDmjzisTrj57qKCJQDdx3VYDckE6ys?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
  - [Clients range from seed-stage startups to public companies (e.g., Reddit, RAM, K-Gen)](https://fathom.video/share/hzSDmjzisTrj57qKCJQDdx3VYDckE6ys?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
  - Services include:
      - [Content strategy development](https://fathom.video/share/hzSDmjzisTrj57qKCJQDdx3VYDckE6ys?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
      - [AI-powered content production with human editing](https://fathom.video/share/hzSDmjzisTrj57qKCJQDdx3VYDckE6ys?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
      - [Link building to improve domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/hzSDmjzisTrj57qKCJQDdx3VYDckE6ys?tab=summary&timestamp=1055.0)
  - Process involves:
    1.  Content strategy and keyword research
    2.  AI-driven article generation with multi-step workflow
    3.  Human editing and fact-checking
    4.  Custom CTAs and ongoing content enrichment
  - [Two main content types: Editorial and Programmatic](https://fathom.video/share/hzSDmjzisTrj57qKCJQDdx3VYDckE6ys?tab=summary&timestamp=898.0)
  - Pricing plans based on content volume and additional services

### Case Studies and Results

  - [Swivel: 5x traffic increase in a short time](https://fathom.video/share/hzSDmjzisTrj57qKCJQDdx3VYDckE6ys?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Steadily: Significant growth in landlord space content](https://fathom.video/share/hzSDmjzisTrj57qKCJQDdx3VYDckE6ys?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
  - [Clay: Created CEO dossier pages for sales prospecting](https://fathom.video/share/hzSDmjzisTrj57qKCJQDdx3VYDckE6ys?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)
  - [New site example: Grew to 900 clicks/month from zero](https://fathom.video/share/hzSDmjzisTrj57qKCJQDdx3VYDckE6ys?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)

### Link Building Strategy

  - [AI-powered outbound campaigns to acquire high-quality backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/hzSDmjzisTrj57qKCJQDdx3VYDckE6ys?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)
  - [Targeting \~25 high domain authority backlinks consistently](https://fathom.video/share/hzSDmjzisTrj57qKCJQDdx3VYDckE6ys?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Crucial for improving domain authority and ranking potential, especially for new sites](https://fathom.video/share/hzSDmjzisTrj57qKCJQDdx3VYDckE6ys?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

### Engagement Timeline and Expectations

  - [Currently booking kickoffs for February due to high demand](https://fathom.video/share/hzSDmjzisTrj57qKCJQDdx3VYDckE6ys?tab=summary&timestamp=1222.0)
  - Typical first few weeks:
    1.  Kickoff and initial research
    2.  Strategy sharing and alignment
    3.  Content calibration and publishing begins
  - [Long-term approach: Results compound over time](https://fathom.video/share/hzSDmjzisTrj57qKCJQDdx3VYDckE6ys?tab=summary&timestamp=1324.0)
  - [3-month mark: Expect to see indexing, impression growth, and production ramp-up](https://fathom.video/share/hzSDmjzisTrj57qKCJQDdx3VYDckE6ys?tab=summary&timestamp=1413.0)
  - [Significant results typically visible after 3-6 months](https://fathom.video/share/hzSDmjzisTrj57qKCJQDdx3VYDckE6ys?tab=summary&timestamp=1435.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send a detailed sample SOW (Statement of Work) to Maria-Elena](https://fathom.video/share/hzSDmjzisTrj57qKCJQDdx3VYDckE6ys?tab=summary&timestamp=1201.0)
  - [Maria-Elena to review the SOW and consider engagement timeline (February start)](https://fathom.video/share/hzSDmjzisTrj57qKCJQDdx3VYDckE6ys?tab=summary&timestamp=1257.0)
  - [Discuss internally at getdynamiq.ai about potential long-term content marketing investment](https://fathom.video/share/hzSDmjzisTrj57qKCJQDdx3VYDckE6ys?tab=summary&timestamp=1163.0)
  - [If interested, secure a spot in fwd.digital's February kickoff schedule](https://fathom.video/share/hzSDmjzisTrj57qKCJQDdx3VYDckE6ys?tab=summary&timestamp=1262.0)

action_items.description: Send sample SLW to Maria-Elena detailing FWD.digital's content/SEO work streams
